raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Deepfake technology is a powerful and dangerous tool used in misinformation campaigns during elections.",
    "Deepfakes can blur the line between truth and fiction, making it easier to pass off fake events as real.",
    "The manipulation of video can potentially incite violence, alter election outcomes, and undermine diplomacy.",
    "Deepfakes raise profound questions about national security and democratic governance.",
    "The US Director of National Intelligence warned that deepfakes will probably be used to disrupt the 2020 election.",
    "A UC Berkeley professor is developing a system to detect deepfakes of political candidates."
  ]
}
```
